content.content: Content creator, online social media personality, and TikTok star who is known for sharing her life as a police officer on social media. She has posted outfits that she wore as a police cadet, as well as footage of her police academy hair tutorial. She launched her account in February 2016. She has multiple tattoos and piercing. She filmed a lip-sync toKhloé Kardashiansaying, "I never said it was healthy, I just said it's how I cope with things." She has amassed more than 150,000 followers on her _alexandragrace TikTok account. Her father was also a police officer and inspired her love for policing. She had a boyfriend named Ethan. Her TikTok videos used music by artists likeTaylor Swift,AC/DC, andSabrina Carpenter.
